Source: https://docs.premarket.me/llms.txt

---

# Premarket Docs

## Docs

- [Get arbitrage opportunities](https://docs.premarket.me/api-reference/arbitrage/get-arbitrage-opportunities.md): Returns current arbitrage opportunities between platforms.
- [Create API key](https://docs.premarket.me/api-reference/auth/create-api-key.md): Creates a new API key for your account.
- [Refresh session](https://docs.premarket.me/api-reference/auth/refresh-session.md): Issues a new access token for an already signed-in user.
- [Sign in with wallet](https://docs.premarket.me/api-reference/auth/sign-in-with-wallet.md): Signs in a user with a wallet signature and starts an authenticated session.
- [Get market token balances](https://docs.premarket.me/api-reference/balances/get-market-token-balances.md): Returns non-zero balances for market tokens held by the provided wallets.
- [Get wallet cash balances](https://docs.premarket.me/api-reference/balances/get-wallet-cash-balances.md): Returns stablecoin balances for one or more wallet addresses.
- [Get event details](https://docs.premarket.me/api-reference/events/get-event-details.md): Returns full details for one event by `event_slug`.
- [List market events](https://docs.premarket.me/api-reference/events/list-market-events.md): Returns the main list of market events with pagination and optional filters by platform and category. You can also change the order of results with the `sort` parameter.
- [Plan best order split](https://docs.premarket.me/api-reference/liquidity/plan-best-order-split.md): Calculates how to split one buy or sell order across platforms to get a better execution.
- [Get market by id](https://docs.premarket.me/api-reference/market/get-market-by-id.md): Returns one market with its outcomes and event context for the selected platform.
- [Get outcome orderbook](https://docs.premarket.me/api-reference/orderbook/get-outcome-orderbook.md): Returns price levels for one outcome across available platforms, plus a combined book.
- [Get portfolio positions](https://docs.premarket.me/api-reference/positions/get-portfolio-positions.md): Returns open positions for one or more wallets in a single portfolio view.
- [Check regional availability](https://docs.premarket.me/api-reference/restricts/check-regional-availability.md): Returns whether trading is available for the current user region.
- [Get my profile](https://docs.premarket.me/api-reference/user/get-my-profile.md): Returns profile data for the signed-in user.
- [Get market by id](https://docs.premarket.me/api-reference/v2market/get-market-by-id.md): Returns one market with its outcomes and event context for the selected platform.
- [List platforms](https://docs.premarket.me/api-reference/v2platforms/list-platforms.md)
- [Getting Started](https://docs.premarket.me/getting-started.md): How to work with Premarket API
- [Premarket Docs](https://docs.premarket.me/index.md): Premarket platform documentation and API reference

## OpenAPI Specs

- [openapi](https://docs.premarket.me/api-reference/openapi.json)

## Optional

- [X (Twitter)](https://x.com/pre_markets)
